data.title: U.S. Dollar Faces Volatility Amid Thanksgiving Market Closure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the U.S. market closure for Thanksgiving on November 27 has led to reduced liquidity, amplifying currency trading volatility. The dollar is retreating from a six-month high reached a week ago, poised for its largest weekly decline since July.

Brent Donnelly, President of Spectra Markets, noted that market participants will soon focus on major trading strategies for 2026, and he strongly believes that going long on the dollar will not be among them.

He added that if White House economic advisor Hassett, who advocates for interest rate cuts, is appointed as the next Federal Reserve Chair, it could negatively impact the dollar.

data.title: "Brother Machi" has begun closing out his ETH long positions in batches, and the current total unrealized profit of these long positions exceeds $900,000.
data.description: According to on-chain data monitoring, "Brother Machi" has begun to gradually close out and reduce his ETH long positions. Currently, his combined floating profit for ETH and HYPE long positions exceeds $900,000, with approximately $684,000 in floating profit for ETH long positions and approximately $286,000 in floating profit for HYPE long positions.

data.title: CMC Altcoin Season Index Stands at 23
data.description: According to CoinMarketCap (CMC) data, the CMC Altcoin Season Index currently stands at 23. The index measures market performance by analyzing the top 100 cryptocurrencies by market capitalization to determine whether the market is shifting towards altcoins or Bitcoin dominance.

data.title: U.S. Markets Adjust Trading Hours Due to Thanksgiving Holiday
data.description: According to PANews, the U.S. Thanksgiving holiday on November 27 has led to a one-day closure of U.S. stock and bond markets. Trading will resume tomorrow, November 28, with an early close. On November 27, the Chicago Mercantile Exchange (CME) will end trading of precious metals and U.S. oil futures contracts early at 03:30 UTC+8, while stock index futures contracts will close at 02:00 UTC+8. Additionally, the Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) will conclude Brent crude oil futures trading at 02:30 UTC+8.

data.title: KuCoin donated HKD 2 million to support relief efforts following the Tai Po fire in Hong Kong.
data.description: A recent devastating fire at Hung Fuk Court in Tai Po, Hong Kong, has caused immense damage and deeply saddened the community. KuCoin, through its Tongren Foundation, has donated HK$2 million to support assistance programs for firefighters and their families (including children) under the Hong Kong Fire Services Department, as well as related support efforts following the Tai Po fire. KuCoin expresses its highest respect to the firefighters and rescue personnel battling the blaze and extends its deepest sympathy to the affected residents. KuCoin will continue to monitor the progress of rescue and community reconstruction efforts, standing shoulder to shoulder with the people of Hong Kong to overcome this difficult time.

data.title: Bitget Wallet launches SOL self-built node staking and wealth management, offering 6.37% on-chain yield.
data.description: Bitget Wallet has launched an SOL-based staking investment service, providing users with on-chain returns through its self-built Solana validator nodes. The product currently projects an annualized return of approximately 6.37%, with returns distributed in SOL every 2-3 days, which users can manually claim within their wallets. Participation is straightforward, with interest accruing from the next epoch after purchase. The redemption process takes approximately 2-3 days, with principal and returns credited in a single transaction. Bitget Wallet states that its self-built nodes do not rely on third-party service providers; all returns come directly from the Solana on-chain mechanism. Following previous security incidents involving external node service providers, Bitget Wallet opted for self-built nodes to enhance security. This product aims to provide users with a way to continue accumulating assets in SOL-based terms during periods of market volatility, while assets remain in the user's own wallet. The purchase and redemption process is transparent and incurs no additional losses.

data.title: Arthur Hayes has further increased his holdings of ENA and ETHFI, bringing his total holdings to 4.89 million and 696,000 coins respectively.

Latest data shows that he has purchased: 2 million ENA (worth $556,000), increasing his total ENA holdings to 4.89 million (approximately $1.37 million); and 364,987 ETHFI (worth $287,000), raising his total ETHFI holdings to 696,000 (approximately $543,000).

data.title: Crypto Quant founder: Upbit hack caused arbitrage bots to temporarily shut down, and Korean funds took the opportunity to drive up altcoin prices.
data.description: Ki Young Ju, founder of Crypto Quant, posted on the X platform that after Upbit suspended withdrawals due to a hacker attack, the arbitrage bot temporarily stopped working, and South Korean retail investors took the opportunity to drive up the prices of various altcoins on the platform.

data.title: Binance Launches KernelDAO (KERNEL) Simple Earn Promotions
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform has introduced two promotional offerings for KernelDAO (KERNEL) through its Simple Earn Flexible and Locked Products. During the promotion period, users subscribing to KERNEL Simple Earn Products can benefit from a 10% Bonus Tiered Annual Percentage Rate (APR) on Flexible Products and up to 29.9% APR on Locked Products.

The subscription operates on a first-come, first-served basis, with specific minimum and maximum subscription limits impacting the APR. Bonus Tiered APR rewards are distributed daily to users' Spot Accounts, starting the day after accrual begins, which is two days post-subscription. Real-Time APR is accrued and added to users' Earn Accounts every minute, while Locked Products APR is also distributed daily, following the same timeline.

The promotion period for KERNEL Flexible Products runs from 2025-11-27 00:00 (UTC) to 2025-12-31 23:59 (UTC), with a minimum subscription limit of 0.1 KERNEL and a maximum of 1.4 million KERNEL. The APR during this period ranges from 7% to 17%, depending on the tier. For Locked Products, the promotion spans from 2025-11-27 10:00 (UTC) to 2026-05-27 09:59 (UTC), with varying durations of 30, 60, and 90 days, offering APRs of 21.9%, 25.9%, and 29.9%, respectively.

Users can participate by purchasing KERNEL on the Spot Market or through the Buy Crypto page, which supports various payment methods. They can then subscribe to the desired KERNEL Simple Earn Product to start earning rewards. Binance emphasizes that only users who complete identity verification during the promotion period are eligible for rewards, and sub-accounts do not qualify for Bonus Tiered APR rewards. Changes to the Binance Simple Earn Rewards Rate will be communicated on the platform as needed.

data.title: XRP ETF Debut Sparks Heavy Accumulation and a Bullish Technical Setup
data.description:
XRP’s first wave of U. S. -listed spot ETFs is off to a powerful start, pulling in close to 80 million XRP on their opening day and quickly lifting total assets under management to $778 million, according to XRP Insights.
source: https://cryptodnes.bg/en/xrp-etf-debut-sparks-heavy-accumulation-and-a-bullish-technical-setup/
